prompt: Remove the # Tesla folder from the desktop screenshot (attached) of the Windows Explorer
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a screenshot of Windows Explorer. Remove the '# Tesla' folder, which is the last folder listed in the third column of items displayed in the main content area of the window. Fill the space naturally to integrate with the surrounding content.
